business.name: WinFlow
business.idea: AI proposal generation for SMBs and freelancers

current_goal.description: Build actual product MVP — proposal generation engine
current_goal.milestone: Working AI proposal generator that real users can use
current_goal.task: Build MVP: landing page done → now build proposal generation workflow

progress.details: First landing page in proposalforge/ directory
Name collision with proposalforge.app — pivoted to WinFlow. Built new landing page, deployed to https://thesandemon.github.io/winflow/
Waitlist live at winflow landing page. Phase 1 done. Moving to product build.

progress.action: Built WinFlow MVP app — proposal generation engine
progress.details: Full single-page app at kaito/app/index.html. Features: brief form, template-based proposal generation, AI (OpenAI) hook with fallback, PDF export via jsPDF, live preview editor, share link generation. Works standalone — no backend needed.

next_goal: Test the MVP app, get feedback from Sand, wire up email notifications, set up basic analytics
notes: WinFlow — AI proposal generation for SMBs/freelancers. $19/mo pricing. Landing page live. Formspree collecting emails. Next: BUILD THE ACTUAL PRODUCT.
